title: Switch to golangci-lint
body:
This commit vendors golangci-lint and enables all linters which do not
complain right now. CI and scripting has been adapted as well.

comments.body: Please use the module in `./tests/tools` for vendoring. This will avoid mixing tests and build dependencies in one module.

> Please use the module in `./tests/tools` for vendoring. This will avoid mixing tests and build dependencies in one module.

Thanks for pointing me there, I was searching it but could not find it for whatever reasons. :innocent:

No worries :) I am happy that you're pulling the trigger on this migration. I opened an [issue for libpod](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3498) today to track the migration there as well - still quite some work needed to let it pass though.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably ed56830) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
We have to install ostree on travis to make the linter work there. I will check if we can do that easily... :)

:pushpin: Commit cc7a685 has been approved by `rhatdan`
